steps: HU 100bb; flop QJ8r, turn 2s checks through; pot ~12bb

Value removed, bluffs unblocked; BB chooses big_bet_75 = 9bb
With no ace blocker, prefer half_pot_50 and fewer bluffs

steps: HU 80bb; river K72r-5x-2x; pot ~10bb; SB IP with KQo
Q blocks KQ calls; thin value frequency drops
SB chooses size_down_dry thin value or check; here size_down_dry small bet
If holding KJ instead, value frequency higher and bet more often
